mapper.sql: id, refund_sn, order_id, order_sn, member_id, member_username, payment_id, payment_platform, payment_channel, refund_amount, reason, description, status, operator_id, operator_name, operation_type, process_count, failure_reason, created_time, updated_time, last_process_time, note
mapper.insert: insert into oms_refund_request ( refund_sn, order_id, order_sn, member_id, member_username, payment_id, payment_platform, payment_channel, refund_amount, reason, description, status, operator_id, operator_name, operation_type, process_count, failure_reason, created_time, updated_time, last_process_time, note ) values ( #{refundSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberUsername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentPlatform,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentChannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refundAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{failureReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastProcessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update oms_refund_request set refund_sn = #{refundSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_sn = #{orderSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, member_username = #{memberUsername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_id = #{paymentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_platform = #{paymentPlatform,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_channel = #{paymentChannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, refund_amount = #{refundAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, operator_name = #{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operation_type = #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, process_count = #{processCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, failure_reason = #{failureReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_process_time = #{lastProcessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select from oms_refund_request where order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by created_time desc
select from oms_refund_request where order_sn = #{orderSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by created_time desc
select from oms_refund_request where member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by created_time desc
select from oms_refund_request where status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by created_time desc
select from oms_refund_request where status in ('PROCESSING', 'PENDING') order by created_time asc

select from oms_refund_request where status in ('PROCESSING', 'PENDING') and (last_process_time is null or last_process_time < #{timeoutDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and process_count < 5 order by created_time asc
mapper.insert:
insert into oms_refund_request ( refund_sn, order_id, order_sn, member_id, member_username, payment_id, payment_platform, payment_channel, refund_amount, reason, description, status, operator_id, operator_name, operation_type, process_count, failure_reason, created_time, updated_time, last_process_time, note ) values
( #{item.refundSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.orderSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.memberUsername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.paymentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.paymentPlatform,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.paymentChannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.refundAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.processCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.failureReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.lastProcessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.note,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
